message:
feat(layout): add deterministic pane drag/resize state machine

Introduce PaneDragResizeMachine—a fully deterministic state machine for
pane border drag/resize interactions with an Idle → Armed → Dragging
lifecycle. Key additions:

- PaneDragResizeState enum with Idle/Armed/Dragging variants carrying
  full pointer tracking context (pointer_id, origin, current, sequence)
- PaneDragResizeEffect enum emitting Armed, DragStarted, DragUpdated,
  Committed, Canceled, KeyboardApplied, WheelApplied, and Noop effects
- PaneDragResizeMachine with configurable drag threshold (default 2 units),
  monotonic sequence/transition counters, and comprehensive error types
- PaneDragResizeTransition records for telemetry with from/to/effect fields
- PaneDragResizeNoopReason for explicit diagnostics on safely-ignored events
- Re-export all new types from ftui-layout lib.rs

The machine enforces single-pointer exclusivity—only one pointer can drive
a drag at a time—and cleanly separates discrete input (keyboard/wheel resize)
from continuous pointer-driven interactions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
